name: Premier One
description_short: Premier 1 Supplies is an agricultural equipment retailer specializing in electric fencing systems, livestock handling tools, and farm supplies for small-scale and backyard farmers.
description_long: Premier 1 Supplies is an established e-commerce retailer focused on serving farmers, homesteaders, and small livestock operators. The company positions itself as a trusted source for practical, field-tested equipment used by active farmers and ranchers. Their product range spans electric fencing infrastructure, shearing and clipping machines, ear tags and livestock identification supplies, poultry equipment, and general farm handling tools. The company emphasizes free ground shipping on qualified orders over $100 and maintains a product-centric approach, featuring specific branded lines like Strainrite fencing systems, Heiniger shearing equipment, and Borotto egg incubators. Premier 1 Supplies operates primarily as a B2C retailer with online ordering, quick-order functionality for bulk purchases, and back-order management systems. The website indicates they offer customer support via messaging and maintain a focus on equipment reliability and practical farm applications rather than consumer financial services. This company has been miscategorized as a "payday-alternatives" lender when it is actually a legitimate agricultural equipment supplier with no connection to consumer finance, lending, or credit services.
services: Electric fence systems and netting (ElectroStop, ElectroNet Pro portable fencing)
Smart fence monitoring technology (AKO Smart Satellite smartphone alerts)
Fencing tools and systems (Strainrite MiniReel Pro reel, fencing conductors and insulators)
Professional clipping and shearing machines (Heiniger equipment for sheep, goats, llamas, alpacas)
Livestock identification supplies (ear tags, tattoo supplies, applicators)
Poultry equipment (netting, feeders, waterers, heated products, egg incubators)
Livestock handling and breeding supplies (handling equipment, heat lamps, feeders)
Quick-order system for bulk agricultural purchases by item number
Free ground shipping on qualified orders over $100
Farm gift and apparel items (wool apparel, sheepskin rugs, shepherd's crooks)
pros: Specializes in electric fencing systems with multiple product tiers (ElectroStop, ElectroNet Pro, SolarStop 80) for different livestock needs
Offers free ground shipping on qualified items for orders over $100
Features trusted branded equipment lines (Strainrite, Heiniger, Borotto) with established reputations in agriculture
Provides quick-order system for bulk purchases using item numbers
Carries comprehensive livestock management supplies including ear tags, tattoo supplies, and applicators
Includes innovative smart technology integration like AKO Smart Satellite fence monitoring with smartphone alerts and no subscription fees
Maintains organized product categories with 20+ specific equipment types and related accessories
cons: Website requires JavaScript enabled and may have browser compatibility issues for some users
Back-order management means some items may not ship immediately with rest of order
Limited to agricultural/farm use case; not applicable for urban or non-farming consumers
No visible information about warranty, returns policy, or customer support response times on main website
Product-focused approach with no financing or payment plan options mentioned
best_for: Backyard poultry farmers and hobby livestock operators seeking portable fencing solutions
Small-scale sheep and goat ranchers needing rotational grazing equipment and electric containment systems
Homesteaders and hobby farmers building infrastructure for livestock protection and management
Professional farmers and shearing operations seeking industrial-grade clipping and shearing equipment
diagnosis: Premier 1 Supplies is an agricultural equipment e-commerce retailer serving farmers and homesteaders—not a consumer finance company. It has been incorrectly categorized as a payday-alternative lender and should be immediately recategorized or removed from the financial services database, as it offers zero lending, credit, or financial products and serves entirely different consumer needs.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
